name: read_sheet
description: Read a Google Spreadsheet by its spreadsheet_id. With a range (A1 notation, e.g. "Sheet1!A1:C10") it returns the cell values. Without a range it returns the sheet metadata (each sheet's title + grid rows/cols + sheet_id) so you can discover what ranges exist before reading or editing.

spreadsheet_id.description: The Google Sheets spreadsheet ID (from create_spreadsheet or a docs.google.com/spreadsheets URL).

range.description: Optional A1-notation range to read (e.g. "Sheet1!A1:C10" or "Data"). If omitted, returns the sheet metadata instead of values.

operator.description: Optional. If omitted, resolves to the BlackBox's current operator (single operator auto-selected; otherwise the system default). Do not hard-code an operator name.

returns: With a range: JSON {range, values}. Without a range: JSON {sheets: [{title, rows, cols, sheet_id}]}. (Or an error string.)
notes: Call read_sheet without a range first to discover sheet titles and dimensions, then read or edit a specific range. The sheet_id values are what sheets_batch_update requests reference.
